meaning: n.采石场,(知识、消息等的)来源vt.挖出,苦心找出vi.费力地找
examples: The hunters lost sight of their quarry in the forest.
We ended up in an abandoned quarry.
The Mountsorrel quarry donated ballast and the charity bought second-hand track from Network Rail.
Plans for an energy from waste incinerator at a quarry near Dartmoor have been rejected.
